reviews.review_description: Not because I am co owner but that it has way more fun stuff to do then scary baboon it mite not be much right now but can't wait for the future

I play dis like everyday.. (it’s kinda addictive) 
And I heard they are getting a massive update, I CAN’T WAIT!! 🗣️🗣️

1. Pure Adrenaline Gameplay:
You’re always being hunted. No time to rest. Every second you’re moving, jumping, climbing — just trying to stay alive. It’s like Gorilla Tag turned into a nightmare.

2. Creepy Lab Environment:
The lab is dark, twisted, and full of toxic sludge, glowing mushrooms, and breathing walls. Each room has creepy vibes, flickering lights, and echoing alarms that build constant tension.

3. Unique Monsters:
No copy-paste monsters — each one feels different:
	•	Some are blind but fast.
	•	Others mimic your sounds to trick you.
	•	Some stalk you silently and only move when you’re not looking.

4. Endless, Mind-Bending Maze:
The map is always changing. You’ll feel like you’re going deeper into madness. Looping rooms, shifting halls, and areas that mess with your mind.

5. Power-Up System with Risk:
Eat mushrooms to get stronger or faster — but eat too many, and they turn against you. It adds strategy and danger to every decision.

6. Immersive Horror Atmosphere:
Toxic green fog, distant monster screams, broken speakers playing old audio logs, and your own footsteps echoing behind you. It feels like you’re really trapped.

7. No Escape = Pure Fear:
Knowing there’s no way out makes it even scarier. It’s not about winning — it’s about how long you can survive. That pressure keeps players coming back.

8. Gorilla Tag Movement, But Twisted:
Climbing, wall-jumping, swinging — but now in claustrophobic tunnels, dripping labs, and pitch-black voids. It feels wild and dangerous at every turn.
